Statement Coverage for instance /\csi_tb_top /dut/u_csi2_rx_top/u_ecc_rx --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File csi2_ecc_rx.v
    21                                               module csi2_ecc_rx (
    22                                               
    23                                                   input  wire        i_clk,
    24                                                   input  wire        i_rst,
    25                                                   input  wire        i_header_valid,
    26                                                   input  wire [31:0] i_received_header,
    27                                               
    28                                                   output reg  [25:0] o_corrected_header,
    29                                                   output reg         o_single_bit_error,
    30                                                   output reg         o_double_bit_error,
    31                                                   output reg         o_header_valid,
    32                                               
    33                                                   // Debug
    34                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_ecc_rx,
    35                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_ecc_calc,
    36                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_syndrome,
    37                                                   output reg  [5:0]  o_error_index
    38                                               );
    39                                               
    40                                                   wire [25:0] d_rx;
    41                                                   wire [5:0]  ecc_rx;
    42                                                   wire [5:0]  ecc_calc;
    43                                                   wire [5:0]  syndrome;
    44                                               
    45                                                   reg  [25:0] d_corr;
    46                                                   reg         single_err;
    47                                                   reg         double_err;
    48                                               
    49                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50                                                   // Header bit extraction ? must match MIPI CSI-2 spec D[23:0] layout:
    51                                                   //
    52                                                   //  i_received_header[31:0] = {ECC_byte, WC_HI, WC_LO, DI}
    53                                                   //   [31:24] = ECC_byte = {2'b00, ECC[5:0]}  -> ECC bits are [29:24]
    54                                                   //   [23:16] = WC_HI  = WC[15:8]             -> D[23:16]
    55                                                   //   [15:8]  = WC_LO  = WC[7:0]              -> D[15:8]
    56                                                   //   [7:0]   = DI     = {VC[1:0], DT[5:0]}   -> D[7:0]
    57                                                   //
    58                                                   //  ECC equations use i_header_data where:
    59                                                   //   [7:0]   = D[7:0]  = DI  = {VC, DT}
    60                                                   //   [15:8]  = D[15:8] = WC_LO
    61                                                   //   [23:16] = D[23:16]= WC_HI
    62                                                   //   [25:24] = 2'b00
    63                                                   //  So d_rx must be {2'b00, i_received_header[23:0]} to match exactly.
    64                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65                                                   assign ecc_rx = i_received_header[29:24];                    // ECC_byte[5:0]
    66                                                   assign d_rx   = {i_received_header[7:0],i_received_header[15:8],i_received_header[23:16],i_received_header[31:30]};            // {2'b00, WC_HI, WC_LO, DI}
    67                                               
    68                                                   assign o_ecc_rx   = ecc_rx;
    69                                                   assign o_ecc_calc = ecc_calc;
    70                                                   assign o_syndrome = syndrome;
    71                                               
    72                                                   // -------- ECC RECALC (same as TX) --------
    73              1                         84         assign ecc_calc[0] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[1]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[4]^d_rx[5]^d_rx[7]^d_rx[10]^d_rx[11]^d_rx[13]^d_rx[16]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[24];
    74              1                         84         assign ecc_calc[1] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[1]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[4]^d_rx[6]^d_rx[8]^d_rx[10]^d_rx[12]^d_rx[14]^d_rx[17]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[25];
    75              1                        124         assign ecc_calc[2] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[5]^d_rx[6]^d_rx[9]^d_rx[11]^d_rx[12]^d_rx[15]^d_rx[18]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]; // FIX: removed d_rx[23]
    76              1                         84         assign ecc_calc[3] = d_rx[1]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[7]^d_rx[8]^d_rx[9]^d_rx[13]^d_rx[14]^d_rx[15]^d_rx[19]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[24]^d_rx[25]; // FIX: removed d_rx[22]
    77              1                        124         assign ecc_calc[4] = d_rx[4]^d_rx[5]^d_rx[6]^d_rx[7]^d_rx[8]^d_rx[9]^d_rx[16]^d_rx[17]^d_rx[18]^d_rx[19]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[24]^d_rx[25];
    78              1                        124         assign ecc_calc[5] = d_rx[10]^d_rx[11]^d_rx[12]^d_rx[13]^d_rx[14]^d_rx[15]^d_rx[16]^d_rx[17]^d_rx[18]^d_rx[19]^d_rx[22]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[24]^d_rx[25]; // FIX: removed d_rx[21]
    79                                               
    80              1                        207         assign syndrome = ecc_rx ^ ecc_calc;
    81

    8                                                module crc_rx (
    9                                                    input          clk,
    10                                                   input          reset_n,
    11                                                   input          crc_en,
    12                                                   input          i_data_valid,
    13                                                   input  [7:0]   i_data_in,
    14                                                   input          i_start,
    15                                                   input          i_end,
    16                                                   output reg     o_crc_ok,
    17                                                   output reg     o_crc_done
    18                                               );
    19                                               
    20                                                   reg  [15:0] crc_reg;
    21                                                   reg  [1:0]  crc_state;
    22                                                   reg  [7:0]  rx_lsb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25                                                   // Combinational: compute next CRC value
    26                                                   // Use a 16-entry shift register array to avoid W415a on crc_temp
    27                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28                                                   integer     i;
    29                                                   reg [15:0]  crc_pipe [0:8];   // pipeline: crc_pipe[0]=seed, crc_pipe[8]=result
    30                                                   reg [7:0]   data_pipe[0:8];   // same for data_byte shifting
    31                                               
    32              1                    9399677         always @(*) begin
    33                                                       // Stage 0: seed selection
    34              1                    9399677             crc_pipe[0]  = i_start ? 16'hFFFF : crc_reg;
    35              1                    9399677             data_pipe[0] = i_data_in;
    36                                               
    37                                                       // Stages 1-8: one bit per stage, no signal written twice
    38              1                    9399677             for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin
    38              2                   75197416     
    39                                                           if ((crc_pipe[i][0] ^ data_pipe[i][0]) == 1'b1)
    40              1                   37597859                     crc_pipe[i+1]  = (crc_pipe[i] >> 1) ^ 16'h8408;
    41                                                           else
    42              1                   37599557                     crc_pipe[i+1]  = crc_pipe[i] >> 1;
    43              1                   75197416                 data_pipe[i+1] = data_pipe[i] >> 1;
    44                                                       end
    45                                                   end
    46                                               
    47              1                    9394051         wire [15:0] crc_next = crc_pipe[8];   // final result
    48                                               
    49                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50                                                   // Sequential: register updates only
    51                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    52              1                    6273011         always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    53                                                       if (!reset_n) begin
    54              1                        158                 crc_reg    <= 16'hFFFF;
    55              1                        158                 crc_state  <= 2'd0;
    56              1                        158                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    57              1                        158                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    58              1                        158                 rx_lsb     <= 8'h00;
    59                                               
    60                                                       end else if (!crc_en) begin
    61              1                    3122736                 crc_reg    <= 16'hFFFF;
    62              1                    3122736                 crc_state  <= 2'd0;
    63              1                    3122736                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    64              1                    3122736                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    65              1                    3122736                 rx_lsb     <= 8'h00;
    66                                               
    67                                                       end else begin
    68              1                    3150117                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    69              1                    3150117                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    70                                               
    71                                                           // STATE 0: Payload processing
    72                                                           if (i_data_valid && (crc_state == 2'd0 || i_start)) begin
    73              1                    3134007                     o_crc_ok <= 1'b0;
    74              1                    3134007                     crc_reg  <= crc_next;
    75                                               
    76                                                               if (i_end)
    77              1                       2003                         crc_state <= 2'd1;
    78                                               
    79                                                           // STATE 1: Receive CRC LSB
    80                                                           end else if (crc_state == 2'd1 && i_data_valid) begin
    81              1                       2003                     rx_lsb    <= i_data_in;
    82              1                       2003                     crc_state <= 2'd2;
    83                                               
    84                                                           // STATE 2: Receive CRC MSB and check
    85                                                           end else if (crc_state == 2'd2 && i_data_valid) begin
    86              1                       2003                     o_crc_ok   <= ({i_data_in, rx_lsb} == crc_reg) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    87              1                       2003                     o_crc_done <= 1'b1;
    88              1                       2003                     crc_state  <= 2'd0;

    69                                                       end else if (i_rx_valid) begin

    26                                               
    27                                                   // 1. Clock Lane Handshake & Delay
    28              1                      16091         always @(posedge i_clk_pll or negedge i_rst_n) begin
    29              1                         43             if (!i_rst_n) o_TxClkReadyHS <= 1'b0;

    31                                                   end
    32                                               
    33                                                   // Gated Clock Generation
    34              1                   82842777         assign o_TxByteClkHS = o_TxClkReadyHS ? i_clk_pll : 1'b0;
    35                                                   assign o_RxByteClkHS = o_TxByteClkHS; // The RX receives the same gated clock
    36                                               
    37                                                   // 2. Data Lane Handshake & Delay
    38              1                   12899380         always @(posedge o_TxByteClkHS or negedge i_rst_n) begin

    40              1                   12899338             else          o_TxReadyHS <= i_TxRequestHS; // 1 cycle analog response time
    41                                                   end
    42

Statement Coverage for instance /\csi_tb_top  --

    Line         Item                      Count     Source 
    ----         ----                      -----     ------ 
  File csi_tb_top.sv
    20                                               module csi_tb_top;
    21                                               
    22                                                   // =========================================================================
    23                                                   // Parameters
    24                                                   // =========================================================================
    25                                                   localparam int NUM_PIXELS = 1000;
    26                                                   localparam int NUM_LINES  = 100;
    27                                                   localparam int NUM_FRAMES = 10;
    28                                               
    29                                                   // =========================================================================
    30                                                   // Fixed-period clocks
    31                                                   // FIX: pixel_clk must be 40 MHz (#12.5 half-period), NOT 20 MHz (#25).
    32                                                   //      The reference TB uses `always #12.5 pixel_clk = ~pixel_clk`.
    33                                                   //      At 20 MHz the AXI-S pixel data arrived at half the rate the
    34                                                   //      packetizer expected relative to byte_clk, corrupting packet headers
    35                                                   //      and causing ECC double-bit errors on every frame.
    36                                                   // =========================================================================
    37              1                   41379879         logic pclk      = 0;  always #10.00 pclk      = ~pclk;      // 50  MHz
    37              2                   41379878     
    38              1                   33103904         logic pixel_clk = 0;  always #12.5  pixel_clk = ~pixel_clk; // 40  MHz  ← FIXED
    38              2                   33103903     
    39              1                   33103904         logic byte_clk  = 0;  always #12.5  byte_clk  = ~byte_clk;  // 40  MHz
    39              2                   33103903     
    40                                               
    41                                                   // =========================================================================
    42                                                   // cfg_active_lanes – plain logic initialised to 4 lanes so that
    43                                                   // phy_half_period / sys_half_period are valid at time 0.
    44                                                   // Updated by always_ff from the interface sideband signals.
    45                                                   // =========================================================================
    46                                                   logic [2:0]  cfg_active_lanes = 3'd4;
    47                                                   logic [15:0] cfg_frame_lines  = NUM_LINES;
    48                                                   logic [5:0]  cfg_rx_data_type = 6'h2A;
    49                                               
    50                                                   // Variable-period clocks driven by cfg_active_lanes
    51                                                   real sys_half_period = 3.125;
    52              1                         36         always @(*) begin
    53              1                         12             if      (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd4) sys_half_period = 6.25  / 2.0;  // 160 MHz
    54              1                         12             else if (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd2) sys_half_period = 12.50 / 2.0;  //  80 MHz
    55              1                         12             else                               sys_half_period = 25.00 / 2.0;  //  40 MHz
    56                                                   end
    57                                                   logic sys_clk = 0;
    58              1                   82834772         always #sys_half_period sys_clk = ~sys_clk;
    58              2                   82834771     
    59                                               
    60                                                   real phy_half_period = 3.125;
    61              1                         36         always @(*) begin
    62              1                         12             if      (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd4) phy_half_period = 3.125;
    63              1                         12             else if (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd2) phy_half_period = 6.250;
    64              1                         12             else                               phy_half_period = 12.50;
    65                                                   end
    66                                                   logic clk_phy_pll = 0;
    67              1                   82834772         always #phy_half_period clk_phy_pll = ~clk_phy_pll;
    67              2                   82834771     
    68                                               
    69                                                   // =========================================================================
    70                                                   // Module-level resets
    71                                                   // FIX: These are driven by always_comb from the interface drv_* signals
    72                                                   // for hard-reset capability, BUT reinit() in the corrected driver now only
    73                                                   // does APB soft-reset (matching reference TB), so drv_* stay high after
    74                                                   // the initial reset and these wires are stable during normal operation.
    75                                                   // =========================================================================

    77                                                   logic preset_n;

    79                                                   logic byte_rst_n;

    138                                                  // =========================================================================
    139                                                  // Wire drv_* interface signals to module-level resets via always_comb.
    140                                                  // After the corrected reinit() (APB soft-reset only), drv_* remain 1
    141                                                  // throughout normal operation.  This wiring is kept so the initial reset
    142                                                  // sequence and any emergency hard-reset path still work correctly.
    143                                                  // =========================================================================
    144             1                         84         always_comb begin
    145             1                         84             sys_rst_n   = tx_if.drv_sys_rst_n;
    146             1                         84             preset_n    = tx_if.drv_preset_n;
    147             1                         84             pixel_rst_n = tx_if.drv_pixel_rst_n;

    329                                                      .rx_ecc_single(rx_ecc_single),.rx_ecc_double(rx_ecc_double)
    330                                                  );
    331                                              
    332                                                  // =========================================================================
    333                                                  // Initial block: perform first hard reset, then release.
    334                                                  // The driver's reinit() does only APB soft-reset for subsequent frames
    335                                                  // (matching reference TB), so drv_* stay 1 after this initial sequence.
    336                                                  // =========================================================================
    337                                                  initial begin
    338                                                      // Pre-load sideband fields to valid defaults
    339             1                          1             tx_if.cfg_active_lanes = 3'd4;
    340             1                          1             tx_if.cfg_frame_lines  = NUM_LINES;
    341             1                          1             rx_if.cfg_rx_data_type = 6'h2A;
    342             1                          1             rx_if.cfg_active_lanes = 3'd4;
    343             1                          1             rx_if.rx_axis_tready   = 1'b1;
    344                                              
    345                                                      // drv_* are already 0 from interface defaults → sys_rst_n=0 via always_comb
    346                                                      // Wait then release the initial reset
    347             1                         10             repeat(10) @(posedge sys_clk);
    347             2                         10     
    348             1                          1             tx_if.drv_sys_rst_n   = 1;
    349             1                          1             tx_if.drv_preset_n    = 1;
    350             1                          1             tx_if.drv_pixel_rst_n = 1;
    351             1                          1             tx_if.drv_byte_rst_n  = 1;
    352             1                         10             repeat(10) @(posedge byte_clk);
    352             2                         10     
    353                                                      // drv_* stay 1 from here – reinit() uses APB soft-reset only
    354                                                  end
    355                                              
    356                                                  // =========================================================================
    357                                                  // UVM config_db + run_test
    358                                                  // =========================================================================
    359                                                  initial begin
    360             1                          1             uvm_config_db #(virtual csi_tx_if)::set(null, "uvm_test_top*", "tx_vif", tx_if);
    361             1                          1             uvm_config_db #(virtual csi_rx_if)::set(null, "uvm_test_top*", "rx_vif", rx_if);
    362             1                          1             run_test("csi_system_test");
    363                                                  end
    364                                              
    365                                                  // =========================================================================
    366                                                  // Timeout
    367                                                  // =========================================================================
    368                                                  initial begin
    369             1                          1             #2_000_000_000;
    370             1                    ***0***             `uvm_fatal("TIMEOUT", "Simulation exceeded 2 s.")
